user_story: As a manager, I want to view certification sponsorship requests with program title, vendor, total amount, max sponsorship amount, requester and status, so that I can review employee funding requests.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Learning Requests screen; When the page loads; Then the Certification Sponsorship Request list displays program title, certification vendor, certification total amount, max amount of sponsorship, requested by and status

user_story: As a manager, I want to view certification reimbursement requests with program title, vendor, total amount, maximum claimable amount, requester and status, so that I can process reimbursement claims.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Learning Requests screen; When the page loads; Then the Certification reimbursement request list displays program title, certification vendor, certification total amount, maximum claimable amount, requested by and status

user_story: As a manager, I want to filter learning requests by status such as Pending with me, Pending approval, Approved, Rejected and Cancelled, so that I can focus on requests needing my action.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Learning Requests screen; When I select a status and search; Then only requests in that status are listed

user_story: As an employee, I want to submit a certification sponsorship request, so that I can seek funding for a certification program.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Learning Requests screen; When I click Certification Sponsorship Request and provide the required details; Then the request is created and appears in the sponsorship list as pending

user_story: As a manager, I want to reset filters and refresh both request lists, so that I can restore the default view and see current data.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied filters on the Employee Learning Requests screen; When I click Reset or Refresh; Then filters are cleared and both request lists reload with current data
